steps.title: Place the modifier correctly
steps.content: The opening phrase A politician from South Carolina describes Robert B. Elliott. The noun immediately after the comma must therefore be Elliott, the person being modified.

steps.title: Reject misplaced subjects
steps.content: Choice B begins with was the year, which cannot be the politician. Choice C begins with constituents, not Elliott. Choice D begins with a date phrase and delays the person being described. The answer is A.
